title: Fugu
description: Free, privacy-friendly, simple, open-source and self-hostable product analytics.
installation: Ruby on Rails product analytics backed by PostgreSQL. ROTATE SECRET_KEY_BASE (a 128-char hex/alphanumeric string; generate with `openssl rand -hex 64`) and rotate the postgres credentials. DATABASE_URL points at the bundled postgres add-on. Set INIT_USER_EMAIL and INIT_USER_PASSWORD to auto-create the first admin on first boot, or visit the root URL and register (ALLOW_REGISTRATION=true). FORCE_SSL_PROD is enabled; terminate TLS at the ingress. App listens on port 3000.
